components.text:
Found while mining for something else. The moment it separated from the wall, the ambient Qi shifted noticeably — as if pressure had been released.
Spiritual Stones carry Qi passively without cultivating it. They are simply full.

Used to craft spiritual stone tools — picks, axes, shovels, hoes — and to make the Herb Pouch.
Every location I have found them has been eventful. What draws the stones draws other things. Come prepared.
